documents.label: A copy of the minor's birth certificate
A copy of your birth certificate
A court order
Foster care certification
A copy of your driver's license or other government-issued identification
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
A copy of the minor's Social Security card
A copy of your Social Security card

authority.notes: Listed under 'To show you are the minor's parent or authorized representative' — any one of these is sufficient.

parentId.notes: Listed under 'For proof of your identity' with 'provide one from each category' — the bullets within this sub-category are OR options; any one suffices.

address.notes: The form does not list a separate proof-of-address document category. The guardian's current address is collected on the form itself.

childId.notes: The form explicitly states 'For the minor, please provide BOTH of the following' — both the minor's Social Security card and birth certificate are required.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Proof of guardianship (if not named on child's birth certificate)
Driver's license or another government issued identification card (e.g. state ID card)
Child's Social Security card
Proof of address (bank statement, utility bill, or insurance statement)

authority.notes: The child's birth certificate establishes parentage/authority if the parent is named on it. If the parent is not named on the birth certificate, proof of guardianship (court order) is required instead. These are mutually exclusive alternatives depending on the situation.

childId.notes: Both the child's birth certificate AND Social Security card are required. Pinned via override because LLM extraction has been inconsistent on this category's logic.

mailingAddress.notes: The page lists two addresses: standard mail (PO Box 9554) and overnight mail (701 Experian Parkway). The standard mail address is the primary mailing address for this request.

documents.label: A document issued by a federal, state, or local government agency showing proof of parentage, including a birth certificate
Parent's birth certificate
An order issued by a court of law
Written communication from a county welfare or probation department certifying the protected consumer is in a foster care setting
A guardianship or conservator document
documents.description: A guardianship or conservator document that is current and not expired, includes the protected consumer's name, and that the name of the person on the court document matches the name of the person submitting the request

documents.label: Copy of a driver's license, state-issued identification card, or any other government-issued identification (child)
Copy of a driver's license, state-issued identification card, or any other government-issued identification (parent)
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
Social Security number or a copy of a Social Security card (child)
Social Security number or a copy of a Social Security card (parent)

authority.notes: The page requires one piece of documentation proving sufficient proof of authority. Guardianship/conservator documents are grouped under 'court' for the widget display.

parentId.notes: Verified from TransUnion's site: a parent's birth certificate is an accepted proof of parent identity, alongside government-issued ID and Social Security card. Pinned via override because the page is intermittently blocked by Cloudflare.

address.notes: Verified from TransUnion's site: a utility bill / bank statement / insurance bill (proof of address) is NOT required for the protected consumer (minor) freeze. Pinned via override because the page is intermittently blocked by Cloudflare.

childId.notes: Step 3 requires proof of identity for both the parent and the minor. The same document types apply to the child: SSN/SSN card, birth certificate, or government-issued ID. birth_child appears in both authority and childId as it is the same physical document.

mailingAddress.notes: Verified Protected Consumer Freeze (minor) address. Pinned via override because TransUnion's pages are intermittently blocked by Cloudflare, which causes extraction to emit a placeholder address. The standard adult freeze address (P.O. Box 160, Woodlyn, PA 19094) is NOT used for minor freezes.
